q1.hi-IN: Chaliye shuru karte hain. Aap rehte kahan hain — kaunse sheher ya gaon mein?
q1.ta-IN: Aarambikkalaam. Neengal engae vasikireerkal — endha oor allathu gramathil?
q1.bn-IN: Cholun shuru kori. Apni thaken kothai — kon shohor ba game?
q1.te-IN: Sare, modalupedadaam. Meeru ekkada untaaru — ee ooro leda paLLeo?
q1.gu-IN: Chalo shuru kariye. Tame raho chho kyaan — kaya shaher ke gaam maa?
q1.kn-IN: Banni shuru maaduva. Neevu ellide irteera — yaava ooru athava halliyalli?
q1.ml-IN: Namukku thudangaam. Ningal evideyaanu — ethu naattilo padanattilo?
q1.mr-IN: Chala suruvaat karuya. Tumhi raahta kuthe — kontya shahari kiva gaavi?
q1.pa-IN: Chalo shuru kariye. Tusi rehnde kithe ho — kihde sheher ya pind vich?
q1.od-IN: Asantu aarambha kariba. Apane rahanti kouthi — keun sahara ba gaanre?
q1.en-IN: Let's start. Where do you live — which town or village?

q1_fallback.hi-IN: Achha, gaon samajh gaya. Aur yeh kis district ya state mein aata hai?
q1_fallback.ta-IN: Sari, gramam purinjadhu. Idhu endha mavattam allathu maanilathula varum?
q1_fallback.bn-IN: Achha, gram-ta bujhechi. Eta kon jela ba state-er moddhe pore?
q1_fallback.te-IN: Sare, graamam arthamaindi. Idi ee jillaalo leda raashtramlo undi?
q1_fallback.gu-IN: Saru, gaam samjaayu. Aa kaya jilla ke rajya maa aave chhe?
q1_fallback.kn-IN: Sari, graama gottaayitu. Idu yaava jille athava raajyakke bartade?
q1_fallback.ml-IN: Sari, graamam manassilaayi. Ithu ethu jillayilo samsthaanathilo aanu?
q1_fallback.mr-IN: Bara, gaav samajla. Ha konatya jilhyaat kiva state madhe yeto?
q1_fallback.pa-IN: Achha, pind samajh aaya. Eh kihde zile ya state vich aunda hai?
q1_fallback.od-IN: Achha, gaanra bujhigali. Eha keun jillaa ba rajya re padichhi?
q1_fallback.en-IN: Got it, that village. And which district or state is it in?

q2.hi-IN: Aur aapke saath ghar mein kaun-kaun rehta hai — bachche, maa-baap, koi aur?
q2.ta-IN: Ungalodu veetil yaarellaam irukkiraargal — kuzhanthaigal, perorgal, vaeru yaaravadhu?
q2.bn-IN: Ar apnar shonge barite ke ke thaken — bacchara, baba-ma, aar keu?
q2.te-IN: Mee intlo meetho evarevaru untaaru — pillalu, ammanaanna, inkevaraina?
q2.gu-IN: Ane tamaari saathe ghar maa kon-kon rehe chhe — baalako, maa-baap, biju koi?
q2.kn-IN: Nimma jote maneyalli yaar-yaar idaare — makkalu, appa-amma, bere yaaraadaru?
q2.ml-IN: Ningalkkoppam veettil aararokke undu — kuttikall, achan-amma, vere aarenkkilum?
q2.mr-IN: Ani tumchya sobat gharat kon-kon asta — mula, aai-baba, dusra koni?
q2.pa-IN: Ate tuhaade naal ghar vich kaun-kaun rehnda hai — bachche, maa-pyo, koi hor?
q2.od-IN: Aau apananka saha ghare kie-kie rahanti — pilaa, baapa-maa, aau kehi?
q2.en-IN: And who all lives with you at home — kids, parents, anyone else?

q2_fallback.hi-IN: Koi baat nahi. Aap, ghar-wale, bachche — sab milakar kitne log ho jaate hain?
q2_fallback.ta-IN: Paravaayil-lai. Neengal, veettaar, kuzhanthaigal — ellaam serthu ethanai per?
q2_fallback.bn-IN: Kono byapaar na. Apni, ghorer lok, bacchara — sob miliye kotojon hon?
q2_fallback.te-IN: Parvaaledu. Meeru, intivaaLLu, pillalu — andaru kalipi entha mandi avtaaru?
q2_fallback.gu-IN: Vaandho nathi. Tame, ghar-naa, baalako — badha maline ketlaa lok thaay?
q2_fallback.kn-IN: Paravaagilla. Neevu, maneyavaru, makkalu — ellaroo seri eshtu jana aagteera?
q2_fallback.ml-IN: Kuzhappamilla. Ningal, veettukaar, kuttikall — ellaarum koodi ethraperu aakum?
q2_fallback.mr-IN: Kahi harkat nahi. Tumhi, gharatle, mula — sagle milun kiti lok hota?
q2_fallback.pa-IN: Koi gall nahi. Tusi, ghar-de, bachche — sab mile ke kitne lok ho jaande ho?
q2_fallback.od-IN: Kichhi katha nahin. Apane, gharaloka, pilaa — sabu milaaile ketejana hueibe?
q2_fallback.en-IN: No worries. You, your family, the kids — how many altogether?

q3.hi-IN: Aur ghar ka kharcha kaise chalta hai — koi pakki naukri, dihaadi, ya aapka apna chhota kaam?
q3.ta-IN: Veettu selavu eppadi nadakkudhu — nilaiyaana velai, dhina kooli, allathu ungal sondha chinna thozhilaa?
q3.bn-IN: Ar barir khoroch kibhabe chole — pakka chakri, doinik kaaj, na apnar nijer chhoto kaaj?
q3.te-IN: Intlo kharchu ela nadusthundi — sthiramaina udyogama, roju kooli, leda mee sonthamaina chinna panaa?
q3.gu-IN: Ane ghar no kharcho kem chale chhe — pakki naukri, dihadi, ke tamaaro potaano nano dhandho?
q3.kn-IN: Maneya kharchu hege nadeyuttade — pakka kelasa, dinada kooli, athava nimma svantha chikka udyogavaa?
q3.ml-IN: Veettile chelavu engane nadakkunnu — sthiramaaya joliyo, dhinakkooliyo, allenkil ningalude swantham cheriya panniyo?
q3.mr-IN: Ghar-cha kharcha kasa chaalto — pakki naukri, rojaadaari, ki tumcha swatacha lahaan dhandha?
q3.pa-IN: Ate ghar da kharcha kiven chalda hai — koi pakki naukri, dihadi, ya tuhaada aapna nikka kamm?
q3.od-IN: Aau ghara kharcha kemiti chale — sthira chakiri, dainika majuri, ba apananka nijara sana kaama?
q3.en-IN: And how does the household get by — a steady job, daily work, or your own little business?

q4.hi-IN: Ek aur cheez — ghar mein kisi ke paas pehle se koi health insurance hai? Kaam se mila ho, ya koi sarkari card?
q4.ta-IN: Innum onnu — veetil yaaridamaavadhu munnadiye sugadhara kaappidu irukkaa? Velai-yil kidaiccadho, allathu edhaavadhu arasaanga card-o?
q4.bn-IN: Aro ekta — barite karo ki aage thekei kono health insurance ache? Kaaj theke paoa, ba kono sorkari card?
q4.te-IN: Inko vishayam — intlo evariki aina munde emi health insurance undaa? Udyogam nundi vacchindo, leda emi sarkaari cardo?
q4.gu-IN: Ek vaat vadhu — ghar maa koi-ni paase pehle thi koi health insurance chhe? Kaam thi malyu hoy, ke koi sarkaari card?
q4.kn-IN: Innondu vishaya — maneyalli yaarigaadaru aagale yaavudaadaru health insurance ideyaa? Kelasadinda sikkiddo, athava yaavudaadaru sarkaari cardo?
q4.ml-IN: Innoru kaaryam — veettil aarkkenkkilum nerathe enthenkkilum health insurance undo? Joliyil ninnu kittiyatho, allenkil ethenkkilum sarkaar cardo?
q4.mr-IN: Aankhi ek goshta — gharat konaakade aadhi-pasun kahi health insurance aahe ka? Kaamaatun milala asel, ki konta sarkaari card?
q4.pa-IN: Ik gall hor — ghar vich kisi kol pehlan toh koi health insurance hai? Kamm toh milya hove, ya koi sarkaari card?
q4.od-IN: Aau gotie katha — ghare kaahari paakhe agaru kichhi health insurance achhi ki? Kaamaru milithila, ba kichhi sarkaari card?
q4.en-IN: One more thing — does anyone at home already have health insurance? Maybe from work, or some government card?

q4_fallback.hi-IN: Theek hai. Kya kaam-wali jagah salary se health ke liye kuch paisa kaat-ti hai?
q4_fallback.ta-IN: Sari. Velai seyyum idam sambalathula irundhu sugadharathukku edhaavadhu piditham seyyudhaa?
q4_fallback.bn-IN: Achha. Apnar kaajer jaiga ki beton theke health er jonyo kichu taaka kete ney?
q4_fallback.te-IN: Sare. Mee pani chese chota jeetam nundi health kosam emaina teestaaraa?
q4_fallback.gu-IN: Saru. Kaam ni jagya pagar maathi health mate koi paisa kaape chhe?
q4_fallback.kn-IN: Sari. Neevu kelasa maaduva jaaga sambala-dinda health ge enaadaru haNa kaDi-tadaa?
q4_fallback.ml-IN: Sari. Ningal joli cheyyunna sthlam shambalathil ninnu health inu ethenkkilum pidikkunno?
q4_fallback.mr-IN: Bara. Tumchya kaamachya thikani pagaaratun health saathi kahi paisa kaapla jaato ka?
q4_fallback.pa-IN: Theek hai. Ki tuhaadi kamm-waali thaan tankhah toh health layi kuch paisa katdi hai?
q4_fallback.od-IN: Achha. Apananka kaama jaaga betana ru health paayin kichhi paisa kaatae ki?
q4_fallback.en-IN: Okay. Does your workplace take anything out of your pay for health?

q5.hi-IN: Aur aakhri baat — kya kisi khaas ilaaj ya bimari mein madad chahiye, ya bas yeh jaanna hai ki aapko kya-kya mil sakta hai?
q5.ta-IN: Kadaisiyaa onnu — edhaavadhu kurippitta sigichai allathu noikku udhavi veNumaa, allathu ungalukku enna ellaam kidaikkum endru therinjikka virumbureenglaa?
q5.bn-IN: Ar shesh kotha — kono bishesh chikitsa ba roge sahajjo lagbe, na shudhu jaante chan apni ki ki pete paren?
q5.te-IN: Chivari vishayam — emaina prathyeka chikitsa leda jabbuku sahaayam kaavaalaa, leda meeku ememi dorukutaayo telusukovaalaa?
q5.gu-IN: Ane chhellu — koi khaas saarvaar ke bimari maa madad joie chhe, ke faqat janvu chhe ke tamne shu-shu mali shake?
q5.kn-IN: Konege ondu — yaavude visheshha chikitse athava kaayile-ge sahaaya bekaa, athava nimage enenu siguttade anta tiliyabekaa?
q5.ml-IN: Avasaanam onnu — ethenkkilum pratyeka chikitsayko asukhathino sahaayam veNamo, allenkil ningalkku enthellaam kittum ennariyaano?
q5.mr-IN: Ani shevatcha — kahi vishesh upchaar kiva aajaaraat madat hawi aahe ka, ki phakt janun ghyaycha ki tumhala kaay-kaay milu shakta?
q5.pa-IN: Ate aakhri gall — ki koi khaas ilaaj ya bimari vich madad chahidi hai, ya bas eh jaanna hai ki tuhanu ki-ki mil sakda hai?
q5.od-IN: Aau sesha katha — kichhi bisesha chikitsaa ba roga re sahajya darkaar ki, ba khaali jaanibaaku chahanti je apananku kana-kana milipaaribe?
q5.en-IN: And last one — do you need help with a particular treatment or illness, or just want to know what's out there for you?

correction.hi-IN: Bilkul, theek kar lete hain. Kaunsi baat badalni hai — jagah, ghar ke log, kaam, insurance, ya health?
correction.ta-IN: Sari, sariseyalaam. Edhai maathanum — idam, kudumbam, velai, kaappidu, allathu sugaadharam?
correction.bn-IN: Obosshoi, thik kore neyi. Kon-ta badlate chan — jayga, poribar, kaaj, insurance, na swasthyo?
correction.te-IN: Tappakunda, sariddaam. Deenni maarchaalo — chota, kudumbam, pani, insurance, leda aarogyam?
correction.gu-IN: Chokkas, sudhaari laiye. Kai badalvu chhe — jagya, parivar, kaam, insurance, ke aarogya?
correction.kn-IN: Khanditavaagi, sari maaduva. Yaavudannu badalisabeku — jaaga, kutumba, kelasa, insurance, athava aarogya?
correction.ml-IN: Theerchayaayum, sari aakkaam. Ethaanu maatrendathu — sthlam, kudumbam, joli, insurance, allenkil aarogyam?
correction.mr-IN: Naki, durust karu. Kaay badlaaycha aahe — jagaa, kutumb, kaam, insurance, ki aarogya?
correction.pa-IN: Bilkul, theek kar laine aan. Kihdi gall badalni hai — jagah, ghar de lok, kamm, insurance, ya sehat?
correction.od-IN: Nischaye, thik kariba. Kana badalibaku — jaaga, paribaara, kaama, insurance, ba swasthya?
correction.en-IN: Of course, let's fix it. What should we change — location, family, work, insurance, or health?

confirm_prefix.pa-IN: Bas ik vaari pakka kar laan —
confirm_prefix.en-IN: Just so I've got this right —

confirm_family.en-IN: there are {count} people in your household

confirm_income.hi-IN: ghar ki aamdani {income} ke aas-paas hai
confirm_income.pa-IN: ghar di aamdani {income} de aas-paas hai
